3321610.name: 1St Pc Game In 1958
3321610.description:
1St Pc Game In 1958:

Fixed perspective 3D unlimited points mini-game, just control the platform to move left and right to bounce the ball and cross the center line to get points, and the highest points will be saved.

How it works:

Keyboard: A/D

Suspension: ESC

Toggle Full Screen/Window: F11

There is no point cap

End Conditions:

1. The ball falls to the ground, and the points are cleared and restarted, but the highest points will be saved.

2. Close the game

PS: Someone makes the first interactive game on a computer.Hats off to some one.

Control the movement speed of the platform, as long as the ball does not fall, you will have a chance to get more points. As much as possible, do not move the platform outside the screen.

Good luck.
